prose:
The Fukui analysis of ferrocene was performed using the GFN2-xTB semi-empirical tight-binding method in the gas phase, with a charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 1.

The calculation predicts that the iron atom (Fe, atom 11) is the most reactive site for both electrophilic and nucleophilic attack. It possesses the highest Fukui index for tracking electrophilic attacks (f+ = 0.22885) and the highest for nucleophilic attacks (f- = 0.25938). This suggests that the iron center is the most electrophilic and nucleophilic site in the molecule.

The calculation completed successfully and reported no warnings.
